name: What can go wrong when trying to get cited by Siri?
description: Thin content, duplicate pages, and inconsistent business data are the most common problems.

mainEntity.name: What can go wrong when trying to get cited by Siri?

acceptedAnswer.text: The biggest mistake is writing for algorithms instead of humans. Thin pages, duplicate city pages, and vague service descriptions usually underperform because they do not give Siri a clear answer to reuse. Another common mistake is failing to keep business details aligned across every profile and website page.
acceptedAnswer.description: Thin content, duplicate pages, and inconsistent business data are the most common problems.
